summary: Iteration 5 testing completed: Output Profiles (Perfis de Saída) feature fully tested. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including CRUD operations, sidebar navigation, and integration with Upload flow.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/output-profiles/sistemas-disponiveis returns sistemas and geradores_implementados
✅ Backend: Domínio Sistemas with txt_delimitado format available in sistemas
✅ Backend: TXT generator listed in geradores_implementados
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/output-profiles returns list with items and total
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/output-profiles creates profile with config (status 201)
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/output-profiles/{id} returns profile with friendly names (sistema_destino_nome, formato_nome)
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/output-profiles/{id} returns 404 for non-existent ID
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/output-profiles/{id} updates profile (nome, config, ativo) and persists changes
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/v1/output-profiles/{id} removes profile (verified with GET returning 404)
✅ Backend: Setting padrao=True correctly manages single default (unsets previous default)
✅ Backend: DominioSistemasTxtGenerator produces correct |0000|, |6000|, |6100| format
✅ Backend: Generator value formatting uses comma as decimal separator (500,00)
✅ Backend: Generator date formatting converts to DD/MM/YYYY
✅ Backend: Generator validation catches missing fields (CNPJ, lancamentos, conta_debito, valor)
✅ Backend: Generator applies account mappings correctly
✅ Backend: Profile ID available for lote creation with perfil_saida_id field
✅ Frontend: Sidebar navigation has 'Perfis de Saída' link
✅ Frontend: /perfis-saida page loads with correct title and profile list
✅ Frontend: Profile card shows PADRÃO badge, ATIVO status, system/format info
✅ Frontend: 'Novo Perfil' button opens inline form with all fields
✅ Frontend: Profile form shows sistema_destino, formato dropdowns from API
✅ Frontend: Profile form shows config fields (delimitador, tipo_lancamento_padrao, codigo_usuario, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Create profile shows 'Perfil criado' toast and adds to list
✅ Frontend: Edit form opens with 'Editar Perfil' title and pre-filled data
✅ Frontend: Delete profile with confirmation shows 'Perfil removido' toast
✅ Frontend: Toggle ativo/inativo works correctly
✅ Frontend: /upload page shows Step 4: 'Perfil de Saída' section
✅ Frontend: Output profile dropdown shows available profiles with '- PADRÃO' indicator
✅ Frontend: Default profile is pre-selected in dropdown
test_credentials: No auth required. CNPJ for testing: 11222333000181
seed_data_creation: Default profile 'Domínio Sistemas - TXT Delimitado' recreated after cleanup. ID: 22a24ee1-2672-4e32-955d-c7445c33b318
context_for_next_testing_agent: Output Profiles (Perfis de Saída) feature fully tested in iteration 5. Key endpoints: GET /api/v1/output-profiles/sistemas-disponiveis (returns available systems/formats), CRUD on /api/v1/output-profiles. The DominioSistemasTxtGenerator produces TXT files with |0000|, |6000|, |6100| records format. Config fields include: delimitador, tipo_lancamento_padrao (X/D/C/V), codigo_usuario, nome_usuario, codigo_filial, codigo_historico_padrao, incluir_delimitador_inicio_fim. Upload page (Step 4) shows profile dropdown with pre-selected default.
